env.SERVICES: agent webui observability mcp-text mcp-websearch mcp-memory mcp-idealista mcp-library mcp-channel-signalr mcp-channel-telegram mcp-channel-servicebus qbittorrent jackett redis camoufox

tasks.label: debug-agent
tasks.command: $DC build base-sdk && $DC up -d --build $SERVICES && until docker exec agent ls /remote_debugger/vsdbg > /dev/null 2>&1; do sleep 1; done

tasks.label: debug-webui
tasks.command: $DC build base-sdk && $DC up -d --build $SERVICES && until docker exec webui ls /remote_debugger/vsdbg > /dev/null 2>&1; do sleep 1; done
